evals.prompt: 我想做一个简单的待办事项 app，可以添加、完成和删除任务。我不太懂 Flutter，请帮我从零开始搭建。
evals.expected_output: Complete Flutter project setup with todo CRUD functionality, proper architecture, state management with Riverpod, and beginner-friendly explanations

assertions.name: has_project_structure
assertions.description: Generates a reasonable project directory structure with lib/, core/, features/ etc.

assertions.name: uses_riverpod
assertions.description: Uses Riverpod for state management (flutter_riverpod dependency and provider patterns)

assertions.name: has_crud_operations
assertions.description: Implements add, complete (toggle), and delete operations for todo items

assertions.name: has_beginner_explanations
assertions.description: Includes explanations suitable for beginners (comments, descriptions of concepts)

evals.prompt: 我的 Flutter app 已经有首页了，现在需要加一个登录注册功能，用邮箱密码登录，连接到 REST API。
evals.expected_output: Authentication feature with login/register screens, API integration via Dio, token storage, auth state management, route guards, and proper error handling

assertions.name: has_login_register_screens
assertions.description: Creates both login and registration screen widgets

assertions.name: uses_dio_for_api
assertions.description: Uses Dio for HTTP API calls

assertions.name: has_token_storage
assertions.description: Implements secure token storage (shared_preferences or flutter_secure_storage)

assertions.name: has_auth_guard
assertions.description: Has route guard / redirect logic for protecting authenticated routes

assertions.name: handles_errors
assertions.description: Handles loading, error, and success states for auth operations

evals.prompt: 我的 Flutter 商品列表页面滑动很卡，数据很多的时候特别明显。我看代码用了 ListView 而不是 builder，能帮我优化一下吗？
evals.expected_output: Performance diagnosis and optimization with ListView.builder, image caching, const widgets, pagination, and clear explanation of why each fix helps

assertions.name: uses_listview_builder
assertions.description: Recommends or uses ListView.builder instead of plain ListView

assertions.name: uses_const_widgets
assertions.description: Suggests using const constructors for widget optimization

assertions.name: explains_why
assertions.description: Explains WHY each optimization helps, not just WHAT to change

assertions.name: suggests_pagination
assertions.description: Suggests pagination or lazy loading for large datasets
